Scroll
01
Market Overview

The New
Energy Order

The world runs on crude. Whoever controls the barrel controls the century. From offshore rigs to continental pipelines, the oil map is being redrawn.

Supply chains disrupted. Prices volatile. Global demand at all-time highs. The energy market is the most powerful force in the world economy.

CORA brings crude oil on-chain — the first oil reserve protocol giving holders exposure to the most powerful commodity on Earth.

$5T+
Global Oil Market
Annual traded value
0.2B
Barrels Per Day
World daily production
78
Major Pipelines
Global infrastructure
85%
Energy Dependency
Global reliance on oil

While the world prints money and debates narratives, crude oil remains the only asset that powers everything. Power flows. Always has.

The CORA Manifesto
02
Strategic Advantages

Why CORA

I

Crude Reserve Token

Each $CORA token represents a stake in the crude oil narrative. The first oil reserve protocol on Solana.

II

Crude Dominance

The world consumes 100M barrels per day. CORA positions holders at the center of the next energy supercycle.

III

Crude Alpha

When traditional markets panic over energy crises, $CORA thrives. Inverse correlation to stability creates asymmetric upside.

IV

Community of CORA

A growing network of oil degens and crude maximalists. The CORA pack moves together.

03
Token Architecture

Token
Utility & Mechanics

Staking

12% APY

Lock $CORA to earn yields from the protocol. Longer lock periods yield higher returns.

Revenue Share

30%

Protocol revenue from transaction fees is distributed to staked $CORA holders.

Governance

1 CORA = 1 Vote

Shape the future of CORA. Vote on community decisions, partnerships, and treasury allocation.

Burn Mechanism

2% per TX

Every transaction burns a portion of $CORA, creating deflationary pressure. Scarcity mirrors real oil depletion.

Token Distribution

Liquidity Pool40%
Community & Airdrop25%
Team (24mo Lock)15%
Strategic Reserves10%
Marketing & Growth10%
NetworkSolana
StandardToken-2022
MintRevoked

04
Strategic Timeline

The Roadmap

I

Phase I: Extraction

ACTIVE
  • Token launch on Solana (Token-2022)
  • Meteora DAMM v2 liquidity pool deployment
  • Community building — X, Telegram, Discord
  • Website & brand identity deployment
  • First 1,000 holders milestone
  • CoinGecko & CoinMarketCap listing
II

Phase II: Pipeline

PENDING
  • CEX listings (Tier 2-3 exchanges)
  • Staking protocol launch — 12% APY
  • Revenue share mechanism deployment
  • Strategic partnerships with energy DAOs
  • Governance module activation
  • 10,000 holders milestone
III

Phase III: Dominance

CLASSIFIED
  • Tier 1 CEX listings
  • Real-world oil reserve verification oracle
  • Cross-chain bridge deployment
  • Institutional partnership announcements
  • Full DAO governance transition
  • [REDACTED]

2026 CORA — Community Energy Token $CORA is a speculative digital asset on the Solana blockchain. Not backed by physical oil reserves or any government entity. Not financial advice.
